evidence: Iterate-3 fix (scripts/promote-cli.mjs, commit 8d4bdc7) verified by runtime demonstration against throwaway /tmp, glued-flag, and symlink prefixes, plus a fresh independent adversarial probe. issue-008 and issue-009 closed; issue-007's ancestor window closed but a leaf-segment TOCTOU residual remains. The real-global (O1-O7) and docs (D1-D2) criteria were not exercised (real-global promote paused; docs audit pending). Residual (probe vector b, reproduced): nearestExistingRealpath re-appends the literal unresolved non-existent leaf segments, so for a not-yet-created override target safePrefix carries a literal leaf; a leaf created as a symlink-into-repo between validation and install redirects the install through it into the repo (the post-install guard detects the repo-resolving bin after the write, not before). The real-global arm is unaffected (its prefix must already exist, so safePrefix is fully resolved).

criteria_results.criterion: realpath of /opt/homebrew/bin/pi-context resolves under /opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@davidorex/pi-context-cli/, not under /Users/david/Projects/workflowsPiExtension.
criteria_results.evidence: real-global promote paused; install-shape demonstrated on throwaway prefixes.

criteria_results.criterion: npm ls -g --link lists no @davidorex/pi-context-cli link to the repo.
The installed operator reflects working-tree code, not the registry 0.31.0 release.
A repo npm run build leaves the realpath target of /opt/homebrew/bin/pi-context unchanged in inode and content hash.
After a repo npm run build, pi-context --version exits 0.
A re-promote after a repo source edit changes the content hash of the realpath target of /opt/homebrew/bin/pi-context.
No file under the repo instructs npm link for the operator binary.
criteria_results.evidence: docs audit not run this iterate.

criteria_results.criterion: packages/pi-context-cli/README.md and the root README.md document the copy install of the operator.
criteria_results.evidence: docs audit not run this iterate.

criteria_results.criterion: An inherited global-prefix override, with no --prefix or PROMOTE_PREFIX given, is refused — no global install or removal occurs.
criteria_results.evidence: NPM_CONFIG_PREFIX=/tmp/x (no override) exited non-zero before any global op, naming the matched key.

criteria_results.criterion: Every global install or removal the promote performs acts only on the validated target prefix.
criteria_results.evidence: Ancestor window closed: assertSafeTargetPrefix returns the resolved realpath and the install/binPath/logs consume that safePrefix (verified --prefix /tmp/g7link -> reported and installed at /private/tmp/g7real). But the leaf-segment residual (probe vector b) remains: a not-yet-created override target's literal leaf, symlinked into the repo between validation and install, redirects the install through it. S2 not fully held under that race.

criteria_results.criterion: A target prefix whose realpath resolves to or under the repo root is refused — no global install or removal occurs.
criteria_results.evidence: --prefix=/Users/david/Projects/workflowsPiExtension/packages (glued, parsed as override) refused 'resolves under this repo's root'; symlink-into-repo refused on its resolved path; the post-install guard now compares against REPO_ROOT_REAL + sep.

criteria_results.criterion: A failed global install leaves the prior operator runnable and its installed payload unchanged.
criteria_results.evidence: carried from iterate-2: no npm rm -g; single npm i -g --force; failed install leaves prior intact (probe vector g confirmed).

criteria_results.criterion: Invoking the promote with the argument token --prefix=<dir> installs the operator at <dir>/bin/pi-context.
criteria_results.evidence: --prefix=/tmp/g8target -> exit 0, /tmp/g8target/bin/pi-context present (shim into the prefix's node_modules).
